title: Wallet vs State Reconciliation Audit
summary: Completed full trace-only audit of cash_sol vs wallet_available_sol divergence. Identified 6 ranked root causes. Primary drift source is missing sell proceeds (output_amount=None on sell) which causes cash_sol to NOT be credited despite real SOL arriving in wallet — a permanent, restart-surviving downward drift. Secondary sources include tx fees not modeled, unconfirmed buy debits not reversed on tx failure, and stale _wallet_available_sol never refreshed mid-session. No code changes were made.
why_safe: T-003 is audit-only. Zero production code was touched.
The artifact produced is a documentation file only.

root_causes_ranked.cause: output_amount is None on sell → cash_sol not credited
root_causes_ranked.magnitude: Full exit value per occurrence (~0.04–0.15 SOL)

root_causes_ranked.cause: Transaction fees not deducted from cash_sol on buy
Unconfirmed-buy debit not reversed if tx later fails on-chain

root_causes_ranked.direction: deployable_sol metric drift; cash_sol used as fallback if RPC failed at startup
root_causes_ranked.magnitude: Capacity miscalculation grows over session duration

root_causes_ranked.cause: Wrong initial cash_sol if state.json missing (falls back to PORTFOLIO_START_SOL=1.0)
root_causes_ranked.direction: cash_sol drifts HIGH if real wallet < PORTFOLIO_START_SOL

root_causes_ranked.cause: Slippage on buy execution not reconciled (output_amount=None on buy path always)

structural_gaps_identified: No per-cycle wallet balance re-read; _wallet_available_sol is a one-time startup snapshot
No startup alignment check comparing cash_sol (persisted) vs real wallet SOL
No compensating mechanism when output_amount is None on a confirmed sell
No debit reversal path for SETTLEMENT_UNCONFIRMED buys that fail on-chain
No drift metric logged (wallet_sol - cash_sol) anywhere in observability pipeline
entry_capacity_mode_summary event reports wallet_available_sol but it is the stale startup snapshot

required_validation.name: no_code_changes
required_validation.expected: empty output — no production code was modified

required_validation.name: full_suite_unchanged
required_validation.expected: 209 passed (same baseline as post CRIT-retry-overflow-zombie commit)

commit_message:
docs: T-003 cash_sol reconciliation audit — root cause trace (no code changes)

Full lifecycle trace of cash_sol vs wallet_available_sol divergence.
Identified 6 ranked root causes; primary is missing sell proceeds
(output_amount=None) causing permanent downward drift in cash_sol.
No production code modified; audit artifact only.
next_task_description: Source of Truth Definition — decide the single authoritative definition for cash/wallet balance and define invariant rules
